references.text: Domingo, JPS, CE Supsup & EMG Agoo. 2001. A new Philippine record of the monotypic genus Scorodocarpus Beccari (Strombosiaceae) from Balabac Island, Palawan. Philippine Journal of Systematic Biology 15: 1-6.
Nickrent, DL, V Malécot, R Vidal-Russell & JP Der. 2010. A revised classification of Santalales. Taxon 59: 538-558
Sleumer, H. 1984. Olacaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 1-29

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 21 July 2022

species.citation: (Baill.) Becc. , Nuovo Giorn. Bot. Ital. 10 (1877) 274 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1984) 15; Domingo et al., Philippine J. Syst. Biol. 15 (2021) 2; ≡ Ximenia borneensis Baill. , Adansonia, 1st Sér. 11 (1875) 271; Type: from Borneo.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Singapore, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand. BALABAC.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 27 June 2024

species.citation: (Baill.) Rolfe , J. Bot. 23 (1885) 211 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 117; Sleumer, Blumea 26 (1980) 164; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1984) 22; ≡ Lavallea philippinensis Baill. , Adansonia, 1st Sér. 2 (1862) 361; Type: Cuming 848, Luzon: Albay. = Strombosia minor Elmer ex Merr. , EPFP 2 (1923) 117. = Strombosia dubia S.Vidal , Sin. Gen. Pl. Leños Filip., Atlas (1883) 20. = Strombosia elmeri Salvosa , Lex. Philipp. Trees 1 (1963) 125.
species.distribution: Moluccas, Philippines. BASILAN, CATANDUANES, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Aurora (photos), Bataan, Batangas, Bulacan, Camarines, Camarines Sur, Isabela, Laguna, Nueva Ecija, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Lanao del Sur, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, POLILLO, ROMBLON, SIBUYAN, TABLAS.
species.notes: Low and medium elevation forest, locally common.
